subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Karim 3
subcodes.first_line: O Karím! Hear thou the voice of thy Lord, the Most Glorious, coming from the Divine Lote-Tree; it proclaimeth
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا کریم ان استمع ندآء ربک الابهی من السدره المنتهی ینطق انه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution
